headline: Data center cooling drives Johnson Controls’ Q2 sales up 8%
summary: The company has new chillers for the sector and is getting into CDUs, CEO Joakim Weidemanis says. It’s also leveraging remote monitoring to grow its services business.

headline: Allspring Large Cap Growth Fund Q1 2026 Attribution And Adjustments
summary: Allspring Large Cap Growth Fund outperformed its benchmark in Q1 2026 despite software sector headwinds. Read the full analysis for more details.
